fit_outcomes.fail: the candidate cannot bind the interface or any observable property fails; the reason must cite exact projected candidate bytes
fit_outcomes.patch: a byte-bounded candidate patch supplies the interface and the full observable property vector passes with mutation influence evidence
fit_outcomes.reuse: all interface inputs and outputs bind without candidate mutation and the full observable property vector passes

implementation_question: Can the candidate enforce the pinned thin-fork ownership, seam and surface policy over an exact candidate tree?
input_contract: pinned trusted base, candidate tree and protected base identity
ownership roots, seam allowlist and immutable historical evidence
content-addressed candidate manifest and projected candidate bytes
invariants: trust-boundary and upstream changes fail closed unless explicitly governed
unknown seams and hybrid governance states are rejected
candidate byte mutation is observable through the adapter
output_contract: ordered policy violations with exact source paths
success only for an exact admissible fork state

test_properties.observable_property: the governed-onyx-fork interface invariant set remains true under the exact A-FORK-001 contract-test requirement
the governed-onyx-fork interface invariant set remains true under the exact A-SURFACE-001 contract-test requirement
the governed-onyx-fork interface invariant set remains true under the exact A-UPSTREAM-001 contract-test requirement
